problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: If Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
